title: Noam Fenridge
content:
Noam Fenridge led a research group at the Harrowgate Institute of Applied Physics in Frosthaven that advanced resonant cavity interferometry. The group's foundational results were published in 1972.

Theory.

Annual conferences in Frosthaven feature workshops devoted to safety protocols for field deployment.

Apparatus.

Pilot studies in 1970 demonstrated stability improvements over earlier thermal imaging pipelines.
